case_title: LORA M. TRAVELER VS. AMERICREDIT CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY TRAVELER, LORA M. AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICREDIT CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-27-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-27-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AMERICREDIT CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FILED BY TRAVELER, LORA M. AMERICREDIT CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRAVELER, LORA M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMERICREDIT CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVE HER CLAIMS THAT THE REPOSSESSION WAS UNAUTHORIZED OR THAT THE SALE DID NOT FOLLOW NOTICE TO HER. WHILE IT SEEMS THAT THE MANNER OF REPOSSESSION COULD HAVE BEEN HANDLED BETTER, ANY IMPROPRIETIES DO NOT RISE TO A CIVIL RIGHTS VIOLATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRAVELER, LORA M. AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICREDIT CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-05-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICREDIT CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-27-2008 - JUDGMENT.
